name: Bimbofication Lipstick
description:
CW: Hypnosis/Mind Control, CNC

Pretty, glossy, and pink! It looks just like your average tube of lipstick... if it could turn you or others into bimbo girls.

There are few and far between tubes of "LipWashing" brand lipstick out there in the world, but whether you bought it yourself or it just showed up at your doorstep by chance, you happen to have come into possession of one. The lipstick has unique properties that induce hypnotic-like effects in the wearer over time, making them become more vapid, airheaded, effeminate, and appearance obsessed little by little, just like a stereotypical bimbo.

What happens with the lipstick is entirely up to you. Put it on yourself. Give it to someone you know. Or throw it out entirely and see where it ends up.

Some Notes:

• This bot is made for AnyPOV. While it is meant to obviously make a bimbo out of whoever the lipstick is applied to, it can be used on men, women, or anyone in between.

• If you'd like to give me feedback or make suggestions for future bots, fill out this google form!
creator: Chamomile-Tea
